arts.sum: Friday’s edition of Turkish newspaper Sabah has a big splash on Nottingham Forest and their alleged attempts to sign Barış Alper Yılmaz from Galatasaray. The headline which jumps out is ‘Bye Bye Nottingham’ and the Sabah slant is that Galatasaray are confident they can fight the Premier League club and keep the Turkish international.
